description: Simulate the March 14, 2025 Total Lunar Eclipse from New York City (40.71° N, 74.00° W, 10m) at the moment of maximum totality (06:58 UTC). The simulation must feature the Moon centered with the Azimuthal Grid, Constellation Lines, and Cardinal Points enabled, and the Atmosphere disabled. Save a screenshot to ~/Pictures/stellarium/ and create a text file at ~/Desktop/eclipse_event_guide.txt containing the event location, date, and target (Total Lunar Eclipse / Moon). Ensure all application settings are saved upon completion.
